description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named msys2 dev-latest that can be triggered manually. The workflow should have two jobs: one running on windows-latest to build a project using msys2, and another on ubuntu-latest to upload the build artifact as a GitHub release. The build job should set up msys2, check out the repository, install dependencies, build the project, and create a 7z archive. The upload job should download the artifact, rename it, and create a GitHub release with the artifact.
